summary: Verified GPS location bug fix end-to-end. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passed against public URL — check-in/out with GPS persist on visit doc, admin GET returns coords, PDF export includes 'Check-In GPS 12.9716, 77.5946' and 'Check-Out GPS 12.972, 77.595' rows (confirmed by extracting text via pypdf), rating flow still works, and visits without GPS return nulls without crash. Frontend: Admin Visit Detail screen renders new 'GPS Location' card with testID gps-section, showing coords (6 decimals) via gps-checkin-coords / gps-checkout-coords, plus 'Open Check-in/Check-out on Google Maps' pressables (testIDs gps-checkin-map / gps-checkout-map). Verified visits without GPS correctly hide the section (in-progress no-GPS visit showed no GPS card). No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~775 lines; consider splitting into modules (auth, users, setups, visits, reports) if it grows further.
Frontend visit/[id].tsx renders GPS card conditionally on check_in_lat != null || check_out_lat != null — correct; edge-case tested.
seed_data_creation: Created transient TEST employee (TEST_gps_emp_*@ugrow.com) and TEST setup 'TEST GPS Customer' via admin API; both cleaned up by fixture teardown. A completed test visit b69735d9-... remains in DB from prior runs for admin UI verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_gps_visits.py covers login → employee create → setup → check-in/out with & without GPS → admin GET → rating → PDF export. Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_gps_visits.py -v`. Admin creds admin@ugrow.com / Admin@123. Frontend admin dashboard lists visits with testID activity-{visitId}; clicking opens /(admin)/visit/[id] which now has testIDs: gps-section, gps-checkin-coords, gps-checkout-coords, gps-checkin-map, gps-checkout-map.
rca_of_issue: Original bug: Admin Visit Detail screen omitted rendering of check_in_lat/lng and check_out_lat/lng that were already persisted by the backend on POST /api/visits/checkin and /api/visits/{id}/checkout. Fix (already applied by main agent) added a conditional 'GPS Location' card in /app/frontend/app/(admin)/visit/[id].tsx (lines 81-117) showing formatted coords and Linking.openURL to https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query={lat},{lng}; also added 'Check-In GPS' / 'Check-Out GPS' rows to single-visit PDF export in /app/backend/server.py (lines 659, 661). Verified both by pytest (8/8) and Playwright UI walk-through against public URL.
